title: Because of You
why_this_song: Because of You by Kelly Clarkson (2004) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 18 times; first heard in: "Because of you"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "I've learned the hard way to never let it get that far"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "I will not break the way you did, you fell so hard"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "I've learned the hard way to never let it get that far"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "I learned to play on the safe side, so I don't get hurt"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I never stray too far from the sidewalk
I learned to play on the safe side, so I don't get hurt
I watched you die, I heard you cry every night in your sleep (I watched you die, in your sleep)
I was so young, you should have known better than to lean on me (I was too young for you to lean on me)
You never thought of anyone else, you just saw your pain (You never saw me)

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "because" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "because" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "never" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "never" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: When it wasn't even whole to start with

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Because of You" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Because of You" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Because of You" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Because of You" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Because of You" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Because of You"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
